name: bb-test-vpc-smoke
author: Amazon Web Services
description: Thin round-trip smoke tests verifying all BBs work in a VPC environment

scripts.test: echo 'VPC smoke tests run during e2e:sandbox:vpc and e2e:production:vpc'
scripts.test:e2e:local: echo 'No VPC-dependent BBs on main yet — skipping' && exit 0
scripts.test:e2e:sandbox: echo 'No VPC-dependent BBs on main yet — skipping' && exit 0
scripts.test:e2e:production: echo 'No VPC-dependent BBs on main yet — skipping' && exit 0
